# CWE-346 safe — Origin Validation Error (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-346-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Writer  http.ResponseWriter
	Request *http.Request
}

var allowedOrigins = map[string]struct{}{
	"https://ledger.example.com": {},
}

func ExportLedger(c *GinCtx) {
	origin := c.Request.Header.Get("Origin")
	if _, ok := allowedOrigins[strings.TrimSpace(origin)]; !ok {
		http.Error(c.Writer, "forbidden origin", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	c.Writer.Header().Set("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", origin)
	c.Writer.Header().Set("Vary", "Origin")
	c.Writer.Write([]byte(`{"status":"ok"}`))
}
